name: STANDARDS-URLS registry rejects a plugin-internal field appearing in the operator-facing file per section 2.6 two-tier split
setup:
printf '%b
' '- id: src-1
  name: X
  url: https://x.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [typescript]
  fetch_frequency: daily
  class: published-standard' > STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
